name: Mannat: Har Khushi Paane Ki
overview: Abandoned at birth, Mannat grows up to be a talented chef, unaware that her boss, is her biological mother. As love, betrayal, and secrets collide, Mannat must decide if her dreams and resilience can help her overcome the storm and find her destiny.

trailers.title: Mannat And Vikrant Meet After 7 Years | Mannat
